commands.review_summary:
The PR routes `openclaw node status` missing-unit and stopped-runtime recovery hints from stderr to stdout, adds focused node daemon status tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than a live run: current `main` sends not-loaded hints to stdout but missing-unit and stopped-runtime recovery hints to stderr. The linked issue gives the shell comparison for `openclaw node status 2>/dev/null`.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is contributor real behavior proof or maintainer override on a protected-label PR.

target.title: fix(cli): route node status hints to stdout
target.body:
## Summary

- route `openclaw node status` recovery hints for missing-unit and stopped-runtime states through stdout
- keep the primary status/error summary on stderr so scripts can still detect the failure state
- add focused coverage for both affected node status branches

## Verification

- `corepack pnpm install`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/node-cli/daemon.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 CHANGELOG.md src/cli/node-cli/daemon.ts src/cli/node-cli/daemon.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm exec oxlint src/cli/node-cli/daemon.ts src/cli/node-cli/daemon.test.ts`
- `codex review --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `openclaw node status` printed follow-up recovery hints to stderr for loaded-but-stopped and missing service-unit states, unlike the unloaded branch which already printed hints on stdout.
Real environment tested: WSL checkout at `/root/src/openclaw-83925` on Ubuntu-24.04, branch `fix-83925-node-status-hints`, head `628884d3d7`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/node-cli/daemon.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: The regression test drives `runNodeDaemonStatus()` with mocked `missingUnit` and `stopped` runtimes, then asserts the summary errors remain in `defaultRuntime.error` while `Logs:` and `Restart attempts:` hints are emitted through `defaultRuntime.log`.
Observed result after fix: `src/cli/node-cli/daemon.test.ts` passed 2/2 tests; focused static checks and Codex review were clean.
What was not tested: A real OS service manager invocation was not used; the changed behavior is the CLI output sink after the service-runtime state is already reported.

Fixes #83925.
target.author: giodl73-repo
